user.title: Add a FireLabs device
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname (for example fl-living-room.local) of your FireLabs device.

zeroconf_confirm.title: FireLabs device found
zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device at that address.

abort.already_configured: This device is already set up.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the discovered device.

init.title: Weather Display
init.description:
Map Home Assistant entities to what the display shows, then set its power schedule. Paste this check-in URL into the device's web page:

`{webhook_url}`

data.location: Location label (blank uses your HA location name)

abort.no_options: This device has no options to configure.
